common.sectionIntro: Search by company, position, skill, direction, or format. Each proposition includes the skills needed and a link to the partner site.
common.noResultsText: Try changing the search phrase, direction, or type.

academic.title: Academic
academic.intro: Exchange programs, international courses, research schools, and partner projects for students and staff.

propositions.name: Inclusive digital education exchange
propositions.description: Short academic mobility program focused on accessibility, inclusive learning tools, and digital course design.

propositions.name: Data analytics semester exchange
propositions.description: Semester mobility for students interested in data analytics, applied mathematics, and software systems.

propositions.name: Summer school: AI for public services
propositions.description: Two-week international school with practical labs, mentor sessions, and a final team prototype.

propositions.name: Research collaboration for open data tools
propositions.description: Partner project for students and supervisors who want to build open data visualizations and reusable notebooks.

business.title: Business
business.intro: Job, internship, training, and project propositions from companies that cooperate with the institute.

propositions.name: Junior Frontend Developer internship
propositions.description: Mentored internship for students who want to build production React interfaces and learn team delivery practices.

propositions.name: Product analytics trainee
propositions.description: Training and project work for students interested in product metrics, dashboards, experiments, and business analysis.

propositions.name: Junior QA automation opportunity
propositions.description: Entry-level proposition for students ready to work with test design, automation basics, and software quality processes.

propositions.name: Embedded systems student project
propositions.description: Partner project for students interested in microcontrollers, networks, IoT devices, and hardware-aware programming.
